sheet_title: Review package script risk before install.

requester.requester_label: Package adapter requests permission to run install scripts.

authority_owner.source_label: Shell-owned package/script risk review; script execution is denied by default without explicit consent.

policy_lock.lock_explanation: User choice controls whether package scripts may execute for this install action.

target_scope.target_label: Current workspace install action only; scripts are not remembered by default.
target_scope.remembered_scope_consequence: This consent is once-only and expires after the install completes or is cancelled.
target_scope.revocation_route_label: No durable grant is remembered; evidence/history retains the review record.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Run package install scripts and native build hooks.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: Some dependencies declare lifecycle scripts required to build native modules.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Complete installation that requires script/native build steps.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if additional scripts, new toolchains, or wider network egress is requested.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, installation proceeds in metadata-only mode or is blocked if scripts are required.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Execute subprocesses required by the package manager.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: Install scripts invoke local toolchains and build tools.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Allow the package adapter to run the required build commands.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if subprocess execution expands beyond the declared install action.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, scripts cannot run and installation is blocked or downgraded to metadata-only.

reduced_mode_options.label: Proceed without running scripts
reduced_mode_options.behavior_summary: Installs metadata and lockfile changes only; script/native build steps do not run.

transitive_scope_disclosure.summary_label: Script risk is driven by transitive dependencies; the sheet lists closure members that introduce install scripts.

closure_members.member_label: Primary package set: current workspace dependencies.

inheritance_edges.explanation: The install plan includes a transitive dependency that declares native build hooks.
Transitive dependency adds script execution and subprocess requirements to the effective install action.

approval_path.host_flow_explanation: No platform host flow is required; this is a product-owned consent gate for script execution.

sheet_actions.label: Run install scripts for this action
